session.objective: Create ADR-044 defining YAML frontmatter schema for DESIGN-REVIEW documents to enable automated enforcement of blocking architect reviews

decisions: ADR-044 defines YAML frontmatter schema with: status, priority, blocking, reviewer, date, pr-branch (opt), scope (opt)
CI gate will block merges when blocking: true and status is not APPROVED
Template created for architect agent to use as reference
Frontmatter pattern follows ADR-040 (skill frontmatter) precedent
blockers: Session log required before commit per SESSION-PROTOCOL.md
ADR review required for architectural decisions (design review consensus)
